intro: Diasperus kunstleri, also known as Chinese angelica, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Diasperus kunstleri include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Diasperus kunstleri is commonly prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to treat a range of health conditions.
